title: daphne oleoides proles glandulosa
intro: Daphne oleoides proles glandulosa, also known as Glaucous Daphne, is a plant species in the Daphne genus, characterized by its fragrant flowers and distinctive glaucous leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Glaucous Daphne include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to note that Glaucous Daphne should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
